programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: As Giorno is teleported between puddles with Squalo’s shark attached firmly to his jugular, Narancia tries to sniff out the perpetrator using his CO2 tracer but is inhibited by Tiziano’s tongue-fusing Stand, frustrating himself and Bruno’s team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish’s father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno’s incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team’s survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team make an emergency landing in Sardegna where the Hitman Team leader, Risotto, is also determined to uncover a certain mystery. Doppio, a timid, wide-eyed teen, the result of a seemingly impossible pregnancy, has his own goals on the island.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having discovered there is more to skittish Doppio than meets the eye, Risotto uses his Stand to manifest various metallic instruments of torture from within his enemy. Fortunately for Doppio, a way to foresee the inevitable offers a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: A picturesque Sardinian cliff becomes the bloody backdrop to Doppio’s sudden dominance over Risotto, courtesy of Narancia’s own Stand. On the beach below, Abbacchio works to rewind time 15 years to identify the identity of a certain photographer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Witness destiny unfold for Trish and the rest of Bruno’s team as her father’s cryptic presence and arcane abilities pull the crew into battles of unspeakable brutality.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Mista closes in on Sale, all signs seem to point to an easy kill. If only it weren’t for the truck hurtling up a mountainous Capri road stuck to his hand or Sale’s power to freeze all objects, gunman Mista would be celebrating over his enemy’s corpse.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Within arm’s reach of Polpo’s fortune, Bucciarati and team meet the unassuming Pericolo, a capo who has come to accept the treasure. In presenting the loot, Bucciarati is bestowed not only the rank of capo but also an immense duty: protect Trish Una.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hitman Team
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Hitman Team’s Formaggio, Narancia is left wondering why the world is quickly transforming around him. Narancia hunts down his assailant with a hail of bullets as Formaggio tries to understand his attacker’s tracking skills.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: By revealing to each other a fearless embrace of the unknown, Giorno and Mista emerge victorious against Ghiaccio. Now, a single member of Bruno’s group must face a single bell tower, a single elevator shaft, and a single menacing task.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: In the crypt of a Venetian church, Bruno discovers not only the brutal truth behind the Boss’s true intentions but also the unstoppable Stand power he wields, a power that leaves Bruno in a pool of blood and in a moral quandary.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Peer into the complex personal pasts of Bucciarati and his fellow gang members, and uncover the thread that unites this diverse group of fighters into a single team and single expression of resolve.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team, now self-chosen traitors, learn from Trish during a moment of calm at a Venetian café a trip to Sardegna is vital. Chaos, then, erupts as Narancia loses his tongue and ability to speak the truth.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Giorno is teleported between puddles with Squalo’s shark attached firmly to his jugular, Narancia tries to sniff out the perpetrator using his CO2 tracer but is inhibited by Tiziano’s tongue-fusing Stand, frustrating himself and Bruno’s team.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw soak up the stunning scenery of Northern Ireland. Will the luck of the Irish be with our antique experts as they try to uncover some hidden gems to take to auction in bonnie Scotland?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Paul Laidlaw and Catherine Southon are halfway through their trip. Deep in the Scottish Borders, Catherine uncovers a pair of vintage glove puppets. But will they give her a helping hand at the Edinburgh auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the penultimate leg for auctioneers Paul Laidlaw and Catherine Southon, as they start in Callander and shop across central Scotland before heading for auction in Kinbuck.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw embark on the last leg of their road trip, shopping in Perthshire and Angus. It's two auctions each -- who will win the final decisive battle in Aberdeen?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new adventure with Anita Manning and Philip Serrell. Their journey starts in the Lake District and finishes at an auction near Blackpool.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Philip Serrell, in their classic Fiat 500, leave from Barnard Castle in County Durham and head for auction in Driffield in Yorkshire. Can Anita hang on to her early lead or will Phil find a gem with a big return?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Anita Manning begin the day in Frodsham in Cheshire and end up at an auction in Easingwold in Yorkshire. Anita risks her lead by blowing her whole budget, but will she regret it?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Phil Serrell embark on the second-to-last leg and Anita's got some serious catching up to do. Their journey begins in the village of Amble in Northumberland and heads for an auction in Carlisle in Cumbria.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for auctioneers Anita Manning and Phil Serrell as they kick off in their Fiat 500 from Castle Douglas in Kirkcudbrightshire and finish at a nail-biting final auction in Crooklands in the Lake District.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant begin their Road Trip in the Republic of Ireland. Starting from Cashel, County Tipperary, in a 1962 Bedford van, they hunt for treasures to take to auction in Birr in County Offaly.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling in their 1962 Bedford van, auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant shop their way through Ireland, from County Kildare to the Dublin, before heading over the Irish sea for their auction in the Welsh town of Wrexham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant continue their adventure in North Wales. Can Christina win the third leg in a row and hang on to her lead?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the penultimate leg for auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant as they shop around Warwickshire, Essex, and get treated to a spectacular Battle of Britain airshow. They then head for auction in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant. Starting in Gwersyllt in Wrexham, they meander through the border counties of North Wales and England, finishing up at their final auction in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The nave of Lincoln Cathedral is the setting for the first of the new series when the familiar team of experts uncover rare silver, furniture and ceramics, leavened with a rich variety of toys, dolls and objets d'art brought by local people.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Blackpool's Tower Ballroom comes a rich collection of the curious and the valuable, from a silver spade used to dig the first sod of a new sewage works to a priceless pocket watch and a rare 18th-century plaque.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An original Chippendale side table, a portrait by a famous 20th-century artist, the rarest of ceramic figures, and a very special silver box - they all add up to a particularly good haul when the Roadshow visits Paignton in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A travelling bar and an amusing mechanical rabbit - just two of the more unusual articles to turn up among the antiques at Elgin in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Elsinore Castle in Denmark is the setting for the first foray into Europe. The team is joined by Danish and Swedish experts for an edition full of family treasures: from ceramics, continental furniture, toys, collectables, paintings to works of art.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fine paintings of Hereford cattle turn up appropriately enough, when the experts visit the country town of Leominster in Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Manchester Town Hall the experts inspect locally made furniture, a clock with a disc musical box and an example of the latest in high-priced collectables: the wristwatch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: French 18th-century snuff boxes, a Colt revolver and a pair of Chippendale library armchairs. From Royal Tunbridge Wells.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An elephant-shaped money box, a bear holding an umbrella stand, three dragons chasing pearls round a large cloisonne vase, and a surprisingly valuable owl called Ozzie give a naturalistic flavour to this edition from the Demgate Centre, Northampton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Sevres plates with false marks, a silver dachshund with a detachable head, and an early chest-on-chest ingeniously cut in half to fit a house, a rich mixture of treasures shown to the experts when they visit Hornchurch in Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the last of the series the experts visit the Corn Exchange, Brighton, to see a group of Meissen figures, a china cat with a good pedigree and an unusual drop-leaf spider table.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The people of Islington in north London bring their treasures to Roadshow, where the familiar team of experts encounter surprising extremes - from a chocolate Easter egg from the 1940s, to jewelled eggs by the great Russian jeweller Faberge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: You might expect the railway town of Darlington to produce fine model trains, but perhaps not a pair of wonderful 19th-century library globes.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Merthyr Tydfil the experts find a most unusual tea set and an important painting by the Irish artist Jack Yeats.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue
programme.desc: At a home for rescued baby chimps in Liberia, Jim and Jenny Desmond teach the orphans the skills they would have learned from their mothers in the wild; a new orphan named Miracle is rescued from her life on a chain.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue
programme.desc: Jimmy and Jenny Desmond and their team are at breaking point, with 38 chimps to look after; losing one of them to illness leaves the team more determined than ever to build them all a new sanctuary where they can live like wild chimps.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan must overcome his own fear, black bears have a dangerous reputation and attack more people than any other bear in the world, but once he meets Lily, a tolerant bear, mother of Hope, Gordon feels heartbroken.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Gordon finds out that Tiny the bear cub has been abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: It is autumn and Gordon finds out that Hope is back with her mother.

programme.title: Nature's Miracle Babies
programme.desc: Martin Hughes-Games travels to China where, without the extraordinary advances in reproductive science, the giant panda would be extinct.

programme.title: Nature's Miracle Babies
programme.desc: Martin Hughes-Games investigates how captive breeding programs in zoos are hoping to increase the numbers of the rare amur leopard.

programme.title: Nature's Miracle Babies
programme.desc: Martin Hughes-Games investigates the problems that animals have when living on an island.

programme.title: Nature's Miracle Babies
programme.desc: A rare baby parrot that has to be hand-fed; a newborn lemur clings to life; a tiny wallaby in need of a foster mom; 11 birds have to be taught how to migrate using a micro light.

programme.title: Nature's Miracle Babies
programme.desc: Bald ibis chicks taught how to follow microlites as they fly back to freedom on a breathtaking migration over the Alps.

programme.title: Meet the Sloths
programme.desc: Sloth bromance develops; deadly tummy bug hits the nursery; sloth scientist Becky gets to the bottom of sloth digestion.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan uses his skills as a wildlife cameraman to gain the trust of a white wolf family; as spring turns to summer, he becomes accepted by the pack, including mother Luna and her three newborn pups.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan reunites with his white wolf family as they try to raise their pups and prepare for winter; he walks with wolves as they hunt lemmings, muskox and hares and encounter a rival pack.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan's travels to the remote Canadian Arctic in search of wolves that have never seen people - wolves that have no fear of humans; using his skills as a wildlife cameraman Gordon begins to gain the trust of a white wolf family.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson shares the secrets of her Italian roast chicken, served alongside a saffron orzotto; Nigella prepares coffee ice cream for dessert, inspired by the ice cream parlors of Florence; a chocolate olive oil cake provides an extra treat.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Pork loin stuffed with Parma ham and oregano, served alongside her speedy mock mash and lazy person's vignarola.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Liquorice pudding; Sardinian sun-dried and toasted couscous; butterflied leg of lamb; baby aubergines with oregano and roasted red onion.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: In Moray at the Forres branch of Moray Coast Vets, veterinary surgeons Mark and Johanna, veterinary nurse Anna, and student veterinary nurse Kristin create cakes.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: At John Gillespie hairdressing salon in Perth, owner John, salon director Glen, creative director Fiona and colorist Rachel swap their scissors for scales and mixing bowls as they go head-to-head for the "Flour Power" trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Private client solicitor Dara, senior solicitor Rachael and family solicitor Emma are joined by rookie cake-maker and document manager Jonny where they compete and bake against each other at Aberdeen law firm Ledingham Chalmers.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: The team visits the Bruichladdich distillery on the Hebridean island of Islay where four colleagues compete for the trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: The team goes to the Tron Theatre in Glasgow where four employees battle for the Flour Power trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Four coworkers at Cyrenians charity for the homeless compete in a bake off.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: At Perth's Cairn O'Mohr Winery, boss Ron competes against sales manager Linzey C, tour guide Linsay D, and production worker Kay.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Employees from graphic and brand consultancy Avian and web design and development agency Blue2 of Broughty Ferry compete for the Flour Power trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: A visit to The Old Mart Resource Centre in Maud, Aberdeenshire, on the former site of one of the U.K.'s biggest cattle markets.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: At Live Language in Glasglow, one of Scotland's busiest language schools, it is a multilingual affair as Ruba, Tatiana, Nana, and Marcus battle it out for the Flour Power trophy.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Allen is at home in Ireland to indulge her passion for sweet things.

programme.title: Rachel Allen: All Things Sweet
programme.desc: Rachel shows how to treat guests with a selection of tempting snacks.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team issue a call to arms and recruit friends, family and local trades to put in their best efforts to help transform the homes and lives of families across Britain.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Lindsey hopes to get a major extension finished following her husband's tragic death.

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de introducir ADN en el sistema, Kasie resuelve un caso de asesinato de hace 30 años, pero una laguna en el sistema legal puede liberar al sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el NCIS encuentre una cuenta bancaria secreta del gobierno que está financiando una red nacional de justicia justiciera, el equipo debe determinar quién está actuando como juez y jurado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un bloqueo de un tirador activo en un hospital naval, el equipo del NCIS busca a un sospechoso que huyó de la escena.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga el asesinato de un Mayor de Infantería de Marina que se cree que murió en el ataque del 9/11 al Pentágono después de que se descubrieran restos humanos en una obra en construcción.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de introducir ADN en el sistema, Kasie resuelve un caso de asesinato de hace 30 años, pero una laguna en el sistema legal puede liberar al sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el NCIS encuentre una cuenta bancaria secreta del gobierno que está financiando una red nacional de justicia justiciera, el equipo debe determinar quién está actuando como juez y jurado.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dispensary security guard is shot by an angry client who dropped his ID. A woman is injured when she crashes a stolen car into a tree. A man barricades himself inside an apartment with his mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When contestants on a reality cooking show accidentally eat human flesh during a competition, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows returns to help the CSIs solve a cold case that has haunted the team for 14 years, on the milestone 300th episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a homeless man who had a huge winning streak at a small casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a John Doe found during torrential rains in Vegas. Meanwhile, Greg Sanders is investigated and accused of framing a man for murder seven years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En el estreno de la novena temporada, el equipo de CSI se une después de que Warrick recibe un disparo en un callejón de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una hipnotizadora que usa sus poderes de persuasión para robar bancos se convierte en la principal sospechosa en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una serie de víctimas fallecidas en medio de sus actividades cotidianas, el equipo de CSI debe determinar qué es lo que hace que permanezcan de pie después de la muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante el curso de una investigación, los CSI descubren que su víctima, una joven que fue asesinada y encontrada con varios tipos de sangre diferentes en su organismo, es hija de un criminal buscado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un caso relacionado con el mundo de la dominación, Grissom visita a Lady Heather para encontrar algunas respuestas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de que ocurre un tiroteo que involucra a un niño justo en el medio de Koreatown, ninguno de los testigos hablará con el equipo de CSI que investiga el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso de un caso de asesinato ocurrido hace 12 años pasa al primer plano de una nueva investigación del CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una popular joven cantante es encontrada muerta afuera de un famoso club nocturno de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI descubre un vínculo entre el crimen actual y un asesinato ocurrido hace más de 50 años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesinato lleva al CSI a investigar un psicópata que cumple cadena perpetua. Durante la investigación, Grissom acude a una conferencia del doctor Raymond Langston, un reputado patólogo criminal, para pedirle ayuda en el esclarecimiento del caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se sorprende y entristece cuando, después de trabajar con el Dr. Raymond Langston en los asesinatos de parejas, Grissom anuncia que su tiempo como CSI ha llegado a su fin y le ofrece a Langston un puesto permanente en el equipo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An adult film actress is found strangled to death in the park and the CSIs are called in to investigate and find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation leads the CSI team down a treacherous road that will lead to the tragic loss of one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Yelina's life is in danger when the Horatio and the CSI team works a case to convict a rapper suspected of a Miami-style drive-by.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una azafata es asesinada en vuelo, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren todos los trapos sucios de los viajes en avión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio lucha para salvar a Yelina y cuando Delko se opone a la súplica de Calleigh y ayuda a su peligroso padre, su vida corre peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras la vida de Delko pende de un hilo, Horatio vuelve 12 años en el tiempo para revelar cómo se conocieron y se convirtieron en un equipo los CSI de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando atacan el laboratorio, Horatio debe atender la única solicitud de un hombre armado para salvar a cinco rehenes, incluido el nuevo CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres jugadores de vóleibol caen muertos misteriosamente en la cancha mientras el testimonio de Calleigh contra Delko amenaza su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hombre más odiado de Miami es asesinado, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI van a la caza de su asesino y su tesoro escondido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods y Eric Delko regresan para ayudar a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI a detener un brote viral mortal en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI recrean una noche de libertinaje de una despedida de soltero para resolver un asesinato y encontrar a un novio desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two young journalists are found dead on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs try to find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The shooting of a 14-year-old boy in front of his 12-year-old brother takes Detective Mac Taylor’s drive for justice to another level.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators follows a trail left by Shane Casey and realizes he is targeting a vacationing Danny out of revenge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a couple is found beaten in their home, the CSIs think they have the suspect after a mother ID's her son, but all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a powerful gang leader is murdered, the CSI New York team of investigators must find the killer before a street war breaks out.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A jewel heist at the penthouse of one of New York's most powerful attorneys takes a bizarre turn as the case leads the CSIs to a man in the morgue.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El asesino de la soga (S6 Ep 3)
programme.desc: Esta semana, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York está buscando a un asesino en serie que tiene un sentido de orientación increíblemente letal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerte reconocida (S6 Ep 4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre ADN que contradice un caso de asesinato que antes era aparentemente sencillo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cicatrices de batalla (S6 Ep 5)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI de Nueva York para investigar el reciente asesinato de un bailarín de hip hop clandestino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Me sucedió a mí (S6 Ep 6)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ejecutivo de software, el equipo de CSI se expone al mundo oculto del sexo con alimentos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: A toda marcha (S6 Ep 7)
programme.desc: Un miembro del equipo de CSI de las Vegas, Ray Langston, llega a Nueva York para ayudar a Mac y a su equipo a intentar salvar a un rehén de una red de trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El nido del Cucú (S6 Ep 8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York reanuda su búsqueda del Asesino de la Brújula después de que un cuerpo cae del puente de la calle 59.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Solsticio de Manhattan (S6 Ep 9)
programme.desc: En la culminación de un misterio de varios episodios, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre la oscura guarida del Asesino de la Brújula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La casa de la muerte (S6 Ep 10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York realiza un seguimiento de una llamada a Emergencias que lo lleva a un ático vacío, pero encuentra un cadáver de casi 100 años y una casa con trampas explosivas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Segundas oportunidades (S6 Ep 11)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un drogadicto rehabilitado muerto en un callejón y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que él fue víctima de un complot premeditado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justicia criminal (S6 Ep 12)

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un joven bombero murió de lo que parecía ser una enfermedad cardíaca grave pero no diagnosticada, su familia y amigos quedaron devastados, pero no tenían pruebas de algún juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 anys després de la seva estrena, 'Forensic Files' segueix sent la sèrie de crims reals més exitosa de tots els temps.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los residentes de Noel, Missouri, se sorprendieron al enterarse de que su banco había sido asaltado y el presidente del banco había desaparecido.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: How do modern archaeologists extract info from a dig? A dig at an Iron Age hill-fort at Danebury is the focus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Horizon follows scientists across the world on a quest to solve the riddle of the Hobbit.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of Giants
programme.desc: The Doctor realises that the government scientist, Farrow, has been murdered while Barbara inadvertently comes into contact with the poisonous strain of insecticide.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of Giants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Susan are reunited with Ian and Barbara. As Barbara's health rapidly deteriorates, the crew find the formula for DN6, the pesticide that Forrester was prepared to kill for, and which could now be responsible for killing Barbara.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive in a London very different from what they remember.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and Ian are captured and taken to the Dalek ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Hiding on board the Dalek spaceship, Ian is taken to the mines of Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor, Susan and David discover a nearby firebomb, left by Robomen to destroy London.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Ian and his friend Larry are chased by the Slyther, protecting the Bedfordshire mines.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Barbara realises how to control the Robomen and orders an attack on the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: After relaxing at a Roman villa the Doctor is mistaken for a murdered lyre player and targeted by an assassin. Meanwhile, Ian and Barbara are captured by slave traders.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Barbara is sold as a slave and Ian is to be trained as a gladiator. The Doctor and Vicki arrive at the Emperor’s court with the Doctor still masquerading as Maximus Pettulian.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Poppaea plans to poison Barbara who has become the object of Nero’s affections. The Doctor is to be thrown to the lions, Ian and Delos are set against each other in the arena.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Inspired by the Doctor, Nero sets Rome ablaze. Ian must fight his way out of the arena and rescue Barbara. The Doctor and Vicki hurry to flee the city and escape to the TARDIS.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on a planet that affects its systems. The Doctor and his companions must save the ship, while assisting an oppressed alien race to regain control of their world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The Doctor, Ian and Vicki have been captured by the Zarbi and taken into a control centre.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Ian and the Menoptra Vrestin try to escape the pursuing Zarbi but the ground gives way beneath them what will the Zarbi do next?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Barbara and Prapillus are caught in the middle of fighting between the menoptra and the Zarbi they find themselves surrounded, how will they escape?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Returning to the Carsenome with the Menoptra's isop-tope device, the Doctor and Vicki are herded into a chamber where they are enveloped in a web-like substance, what next for the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The TARDIS dematerialises from the surface of Vortis. Prapillus vows that the Earth people will never be forgotten and warns that the Animus must never again be allowed to take root on the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive on a planet which houses an all but forgotten museum. While touring it, they are horrified to discover that they themselves are exhibits in one of the cases. Can they avoid becoming just an exhibit in the space museum?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: As the Doctor and his companions move through the museum's vast labyrinth of corridors, the enslaved Xeron race sense an opportunity to topple their Morok invaders.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: With the Doctor held captive by the Commander Lobos and destined to become an exhibit in the space museum, his companions are left to do whatever they can to break the chain of events.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: Ian confronts Lobos and orders him to revive the Doctor as the Xerons' revolution begins to gather pace. But when the four time-travellers are re-captured, will the Doctor's prediction of a future as museum exhibits finally be realised?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: Ian and Vicki are trapped by tentacled creatures on the planet Aridius. The Doctor and Barbara witness Daleks leaving Skaro on a mission to eliminate the Doctor and his companions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Doctor and his friends have been given shelter from the Daleks by the Aridians. But the Daleks threaten to kill the Aridians unless they hand over the time travellers.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Daleks pursue the TARDIS through time and space. In an attempt to lose the Daleks, the Doctor makes a stop on the top of the Empire State Building and then on a sailing ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: With the Daleks in pursuit, the TARDIS lands in what appears to be a haunted house. When the Daleks arrive, the travellers depart, not realising that they have left Vicki behind!

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Daleks follow the TARDIS to the jungle world of Mechanus which is infested with lethal plants. There the Daleks release a robot double of the Doctor that is programmed to kill.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German shepard who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Staff tends to a poodle with a problem penis, a rabbit with an abscess, a cow with a neck wound, and an overly amorous donkey before gathering to say farewell to Sarah who is leaving to have a baby.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian is called to an extremely rare emergency – a pig is farrowing (giving birth) but she’s struggling. He doesn’t know what to expect, as pigs are renowned for not usually having problems with labour.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Cathy Hyde is on a warrant to access a property in Leigh, suspected of being involved in puppy trafficking. Cathy discovers two Jack Russell types and two Yorkshire Terriers.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: An old friend of Peter heads down to the practice with a sheep who had one lamb last night, but is struggling to give birth to her second. Although neither vet nor farmer are feeling optimistic for the unborn lamb's chances.

programme.title: The Litter: The Litter

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter gets an emergency call from Ivor Shaw. He's found one of his calves limping, and Peter suspects her little leg is broken. Julian is overwhelmed when 18 rats are brought onto the practice. A blind sheep and a stray dog are treated.

programme.title: Dogs 24/7

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Golden dog jumps up on and plays piano; goose plays piano while duck plays guitar; Jake, the piano playing dog.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter rushes to help a cow, who after delivery, has accidentally pushed out her uterus. Julian goes head to head with Arnie the ram who is very intimidating for those who look his way, but unfortunately, he is struggling with his own sight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after he accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him from exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: A Volcano Odyssey
programme.desc: Follow the story of 65 millions years of evolution around a volcanic hotspot in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In many human cultures, elders play a vital role in the well-being of communities and are responsible for passing down knowledge and culture.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The interior of Madagascar is dry and mountainous, and the forests that grow here lose their leaves during the dry season, except for those that take refuge in narrow canyons eroded by rivers. These unique forests are home to ring-tailed lemurs.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores the azure waters of the Aegean Sea, traverses the scenic Greek Islands, and immerses himself in the splendor of Venice.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: In the rural north Radar is surprised to discover the culture of the South Seas cowboy is alive and well when he meets Tino Lecren, New Caledonia's most famous rodeo rider.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The huge expanses of olive groves around the Mediterranean region are a humanized forest where trees grow in an orderly manner.

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: Piemonte is a land full of culinary riches. From arguably the finest Italian wines to those nuggets of delight, the truffles, this wealthy region is an epicurean’s dream.

programme.title: Rock Of Ages
programme.desc: Rocks are the memory of our planet. Their constant reforming cycle captures moments in time, so if you want to know about evolution, extinction, or creation, look in the rocks. The question is, are you ready to rock?

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The burrowing asp, a snake that can bite you without even opening its mouth The saw-scaled viper – hidden in the sand until you hear its eerie threat display

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Brazil

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, it's moving day for Girls Ailsa and Zingula, they are off to their new home at Paardevlei while cub handler Emily is also saying goodbye and heading home to Scotland.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Switzerland - Secrets of Switzerland
programme.desc: Explore the secret towns of Switzerland deep within the Alps by bus, train, railway, and cogwheel.

programme.title: Australia: Land Beyond Time
programme.desc: Stunning inside look at a land more like another planet than another country. Includes a rare natural event that happens only once every hundred years: the formation of a giant inland ocean out of nowhere in the middle of the harshest desert outback.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: It’s an emotional day at the cubhouse, the cubs will soon be leaving to become ambassadors around the world and handler Emily is finding it hard to let go. Recently Sebastian has been behaving badly and has started biting his handlers.

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The whales' journey takes them right up the coast of California, where the hustle and bustle of human activity is a stark contrast to the peace of the Mexican desert.

programme.title: The Great Way
programme.desc: We are travelling to California to start one of the longest and most impressive hiking routes in the world: the Pacific Crest Trail. A path that crosses the United States along the peaks of the West Coast from Canada to Mexico.

programme.title: Ambitions

programme.desc: Stephanie and Evan join forces for their own self-interest while Titus embarks on a mission that could jeopardize his entire career.
